topLevelHelp.text:
Enum

Enum values allow you to specify a list of discrete options. Use comma-separated values with no quotes, for example "active,inactive,pending" or "enum active,inactive,pending".

Schema params field: (values)

Params:

  • values: comma-separated list - List of allowed values randomly selected during generation.

Example: enum active,inactive,pending

Learn more

Literal

Literal data repeats the exact text you enter for every generated row.

Schema params field: (value)

Params:

  • value: string - The exact value emitted for every generated row.

Example: literal(Pending Review)

Learn more

Regex

Regex patterns generate random values that match the specified expression.

Schema params field: (pattern)

Params:

  • pattern: regex string - The regular expression used to generate each value.

Example: regex([A-Z]{3})

Learn more

Domain

Domain commands provide a controlled interface for data generation.

Learn more

Faker

Faker commands generate realistic random values such as names, addresses, and dates.

Learn more
